title: 2.4GHz Wireless Gaming Headset for PS5, PS4, Switch, Mac, PC, Ultra-Low Latency, 50+ Hr Battery, Stereo Sound Gaming Headphones with Noise-Canceling Mic
features: 🔄【Dual Modes Flexibility & Multi-Device Support】① 2.4GHz USB dongle mode supports PC, PS4, PS5, Switch, Mac, laptops, and other devices with a USB port. ② Bluetooth mode is compatible with mobile phones, tablets, iPads, and other smart devices, and works with the Switch (mic not supported). ⚠️ Note: Both 2.4G and Bluetooth modes are NOT compatible with Xbox consoles.

🚀【Stable Connection & Lag-Free】Enjoy ultra-low latency with our 2.4GHz USB & Type-C wireless connection. With less than 20ms delay, this wireless gaming headset provides real-time game audio and a smoother gaming experience. No interruptions—just pure gaming action, keeping you ahead of the competition.

🔊【Stereo Surround Sound & Powerful Bass】Powered by 50mm drivers and 2.4G lossless wireless technology, the bluetooth gaming headphones delivers stereo 3D surround sound. PC headphones with microphone experience true-to-life audio for football games, shooters, racing games and more.

🔋【Up to 50 Hours Battery Life & Fast Charging】Enjoy up to 50 hours of playtime on a single charge. When the battery drops below 10%, a voice alert will remind you to recharge. Fully recharge in just 2.5 hours via USB-C.

🎮【User-Friendly & Convenient Operation】Our intuitive control layout makes it easy to adjust volume, mute, or answer calls on the fly. This PS5 headset features multi-functional buttons that allow you to quickly answer phone calls, adjust volume instantly, switch modes, and more—designed with gamers in mind for superior comfort and ease of use.

🎧【Ergonomic Design & All-Day Comfort】Designed with breathable trans-protein skin ear cushions, these over-ear wireless headphones quickly dissipate heat to keep you cool during intense gaming sessions. They offer a soft, comfortable fit, ensuring you can wear them all day without discomfort—built for long-lasting comfort and performance.
